headline: P&G Leadership Shake-Up Puts Focus On Growth, Valuation And ESG Direction
summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) is rolling out a broad C-suite and segment leadership reshuffle, including several retirements and new appointments across key divisions. Leadership changes include new heads for Grooming and Baby, Feminine, and Family Care, with Juliana Azevedo taking over Grooming and Hesham Tohamy leading Baby and Feminine Care. Chief Sustainability Officer Virginie Helias is transitioning out of the role after nearly 40 years at the company, with Michele Baeten set to succeed...
